title: キミの運気☆リッキーにおまかせあれ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I became Copano Rickey's trainer. Right now,
she's staring deeply into my soul.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer, are you feeling a bit worn out?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You look kind of unwell, like you have a headache. You've been
leaning forward with your hands holding up your head for a while
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hadn't noticed, but now that she mentions it, I do have a sharp
headache, and my brain feels foggy.
choice_data_list: I wonder what's wrong with me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You don't have an idea? Hm, if you're unaware, then it must be due
to... a pillar in the landform.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Your office feels okay, so the problem must be coming from your
room!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no time like the present! I'll do an impromptu feng shui
check! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can stop her, she rushes off to check the feng shui in my
room.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, I see...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Aha, there's definitely something wrong! Especially with the bedding,
I'd say. Oh, but I'm not saying it's dirty or anything! The place looks
clean! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But in terms of feng shui, there are areas that I think we could
improve on to enhance your luck!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
To be more specific, I see you're using a towel as your pillowcase. It
might be convenient, but it negatively affects your luck in work
matters.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's also not great that both the curtains and the bedcover have a
patterned design. It makes the yang in the room overpower the yin.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Is that your nightwear? It looks like you're using old clothes to sleep
in. It's good to reuse things, but you should probably buy pajamas.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: There's more I could comment on, but let's start with this for now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We move things around and bring new things in just as she instructs...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Put this here... and done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it, the room does make me feel a lot calmer now!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I know. It's hard to put into words, but something feels
different. The power you feel subconsciously—that's feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Keep your room like this, and... Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ We'll be happy!
Teehee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My head feels a lot clearer, and I'm ready to go. Maybe it's because
of my good condition, but I'm feeling unusually motivated.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Really? I'm so glad! You see, what we did in your room was remove
the overhead pressure!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by overhead pressure I mean the things that cause you tension
while you're sleeping.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
For example, too many patterns around you scatter your energy, and
sleeping on a real pillowcase is better for your sleep than a towel.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
By making these small changes, we corrected the distortions in your
room, and now you can sleep better, which leads to better luck for
you!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: This is the power of feng shui—the study of environmental luck!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When your surroundings change, your thoughts do too. And when
your thoughts change, so do your actions, and even your personality
too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So if you want to be happy, start with your surroundings! Anyway,
putting the luck talk aside for now...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, how are you feeling? Isn't your head feeling clear and
refreshed? I bet you're just bursting with energy, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't you like to put this feeling into words and share it with the
world? You do, right? Right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, why waste any more time! We've got to spread feng shui far and
wide! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She drags me outside, and we spend the rest of the day parading
around the academy until the sun goes down.
